10 = Other Vendor/Other Claims Payment System 
20 = Managed Care Organization (MCO) 
22 = Sub-contracted entity 
23 = Sub-capitated network provider 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This field is new, starting with the 2023 service year. It is not populated in earlier years. 
 For sub-capitated encounters from a sub-capitated entity that is not a sub-capitated network provider,
